reviews.text: Jason is an incredible photographer and videographer! It was honestly the best decision we made for our wedding and now we have such beautiful pictures/videos to look back on. He also did our engagement photo shoot and went out of his way to drive us around the Ouray area for photos! I highly recommend using Jason for your wedding photos. You won't regret it!

Jason and Daris absolutely blew me out of the water. The photos that we received from our wedding day are the most STUNNING photos that we could have ever hoped for! We were absolutely blown away by the quality of the photos. We have thousands and every single one is fantastic! It has made picking out our favorites so hard.

Its also a bonus that Jason and Daris are both just an absolute pleasure to be around and work with. They make everything seamless.

Do yourself a favor and look no further for a photographer! They are worth every penny!!!

Jason and Daris are incredibly talented photographers! We hired them for our engagement pictures last Fall and for our wedding last weekend (June), and although we haven’t gotten the photos back from the wedding yet, I can tell you that if they’re anything like the engagement photos, they’re going to be spectacular!! Jason is very professional and easy to work with. He goes above and beyond when finding places to get great photos, and takes the time to coach you through them and work with you until he feels he’s gotten the high quality shots that you and he both expect. On our wedding day, he and Daris worked from morning to night, capturing everything from getting ready in the morning to the grand exit at the end of the night. He goes the extra mile, like making sure we escaped our guests for long enough to get the perfect sunset photos during the Reception or driving us all around Telluride to find the perfect spots with the best scenery for the engagement photos. He even sprinkled some wildflower seeds at one of his favorite new spots early in the season so that his clients would have wildflowers in their pictures during the spring/summer! Talk about planning ahead! We couldn’t have asked for better and we are so so excited to see how the wedding day photos turn out! I can’t thank both Jason and Daris enough for capturing the most special moments of our big day!!!

I can't speak highly enough about Jason and Daris. I honestly feel like this level of photography was way out of our league.

Everything was so professional and fun. I don't consider myself to be very photogenic and I feel like somehow that was pulled out of me.

It was very important to us that we get some good photos of our wedding. But I never could've imagined they would come out this good! I'm just floored honestly.

We were given great direction. Jason even drove us to our ceremony location which involved some pretty good off-roading. The photography was really just amazing. It was the absolute best way for us to remember our special day.

I still can't believe how these pictures came out and find myself looking at them often. I could go on for days about it. Thank you so much for the absolute perfect experience!

Jason is an absolute rockstar behind the lens! From the moment we met, I knew we were in for something special.

His talent is undeniable. Every photo turned out absolutely perfect.  He did an incredible job of capturing our special day, and even took us out for an adventure session in the snow!

Not only is he incredibly skilled, but he's also a joy to work with. His friendly and relaxed demeanor put us at ease, making every shot feel natural and effortless.

Our wedding album is a treasure of memories, thanks entirely to Jason's talent. If you're searching for a photographer who will capture your day with passion and precision while being fun to work with, look no further. Jason is the BEST!
